name: Wall Item Anywhere Premade Module
author: Shockless
description: Readable user-plugin source reference for the built-in Wall Item Anywhere module.

surfaces.label: Wall Item Anywhere Panel
surfaces.summary: Native Object Mover compatibility toggle and status.

layout.text: Enables native wall item drag/drop outside visible wall bounds.

children.text: Click a wall item, press Move, drag it anywhere on the stage, then click to place.
